title: PESTLE Analysis Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the PESTLE Analysis skill.

problem_statement.description: The strategic question or business challenge prompting the macro-environmental analysis.

company_context.description: Brief overview of the organization's current core business operations and dependencies.

geographic_market_scope.description: Specific geographic or market scope of the analysis (e.g., 'European EV market').

time_horizon.description: Time horizon for the strategic planning cycle (e.g., 3-5 years).

initial_leadership_hypotheses.description: Initial leadership hypotheses regarding major external threats or opportunities.

existing_macro_economic.description: Existing macro-economic data, industry analyst reports, or regulatory briefings.
